## **2.2.2.B. PI #2**

### **What initiatives were implemented or are planned that will improve this PI and how does the NSA intend on monitoring their effectiveness on performance?**

Now new initiatives. The PI is still affected by flight planning around Russian/Kaliningrad airspace. For 2024 the performance was 2,58 %. NSA will continously monitor this on a yearly basis, if there are no indications this PI will detoriate.
